description: 资深 IC（无管理经验）— 12年+深度技术积累，测试 Agent 对资深专家的呈现方式
summary: Staff-level backend engineer with 12 years building distributed systems at scale. Deep expertise in Go, Rust, and database internals. Open source contributor to CockroachDB and TiKV. Prefer staying hands-on as a technical leader rather than people management.

workExperience.title: Staff Software Engineer
description: Technical lead for the Delta Lake storage engine serving 10K+ Databricks customers
Designed and implemented a new compaction algorithm reducing storage costs by 35% across the fleet
Mentored 15+ engineers through design reviews and Pair Programming without formal management responsibility
Drove adoption of Rust for performance-critical components, wrote internal Rust training curriculum
Represented Databricks at VLDB 2023 and SIGMOD 2024

workExperience.title: Senior Software Engineer
description: Core contributor to Uber's MySQL sharding layer (Schemaless), managing 10K+ database instances
Built an online schema migration tool that reduced DBA intervention by 90%
On-call for mission-critical storage systems serving all Uber products globally
Filed 2 patents on distributed query optimization

workExperience.title: Software Engineer
description: Backend developer for search and recommendations platform
Migrated search infrastructure from Solr to Elasticsearch, reducing query latency by 50%
Built real-time inventory indexing pipeline processing 100K+ updates/minute

education.description: Thesis: 'Consensus Protocols for Geo-Replicated Databases.' Graduated cum laude.

personalProjects.name: rust-btree
description: High-performance B-tree implementation in Rust, 2K+ GitHub stars
Used in production by 3 database startups

patents: US 11,456,789 — Online Schema Migration for Sharded Databases (2022)
